info.title: AquaForge API
info.description: Swim Meet Optimization API - Backend services for AquaForge.ai

get.description:
Check the health status of the API and its dependencies.

Returns:
    Health status with service availability information

Kubernetes-style readiness probe.

Returns:
    Simple ready status

Kubernetes-style liveness probe.

Returns:
    Simple alive status

post.description:
Run lineup optimization for a swim meet.

This endpoint accepts team data and optimization parameters,
then returns the optimal lineup assignments.

Args:
    request: Optimization request with team data and parameters

Returns:
    Optimization results with scores and lineup assignments

Get a quick preview of optimization without full computation.

Useful for validating data before running full optimization.

get.description: List available optimization backends and their status.

post.description:
Upload and process a team roster file.

Supports Excel (.xlsx, .xls), CSV, and JSON files.

Args:
    file: The roster file to upload
    team_type: Either 'seton' or 'opponent'
    team_name: Optional team name override

Returns:
    Processing results with swimmer and entry counts

Submit team data directly as JSON.

Alternative to file upload for programmatic access.

get.description: Get the list of standard swim meet events.

Get a data template for file uploads.

Args:
    template_type: Either 'csv' or 'json'

delete.description: Clear all uploaded data (for session reset).

post.description:
Export optimization results to the specified format.

Args:
    request: Export request with format and results data

Returns:
    Export response with content or download URL

get.description:
Download a previously generated export file.

Note: This requires server-side file storage to be implemented.
List available export formats and their descriptions.

post.description:
Compare two teams across all events.

Returns head-to-head analysis and event-by-event breakdown.
Get detailed analytics for a specific swimmer.
Get detailed analytics for a specific event.
Analyze team depth across all events.

get.description: Get the scoring rules used for meet calculations.

post.description:
Optimize lineup for a head-to-head dual meet.
    
    Takes rosters for both teams and returns the optimal lineup
    with scoring predictions and recommendations.
    
    **Optimization Methods:**
    - `gurobi`: Integer programming (most accurate, requires Gurobi license)
    - `nash`: Nash equilibrium game theory
    - `heuristic`: Fast greedy algorithm
    
    **Scoring:**
    - Individual: Top 7 score [8, 6, 5, 4, 3, 2, 1]
    - Relays: Top 3 score [10, 5, 3]
    - Total: 232 points
Validate team rosters without running full optimization.

schema.title: Response Validate Dual Meet Api V2 Dual Meet Validate Post

get.description: Returns the scoring rules for dual meets.

schema.title: Response Get Scoring Info Api V2 Dual Meet Scoring Info Get

post.description:
Project meet standings from psych sheet data.
    
    Uses seed times to predict placements and calculate expected points
    for each team. Also identifies swing events where small improvements
    would yield significant point gains.
    
    **Supported Meet Profiles:**
    - `vcac_championship`: VCAC Conference Championship rules
    - `visaa_state`: VISAA State Championship rules

Optimize swimmer event assignments for maximum team points.
    
    Takes into account:
    - Max 2 individual events per swimmer
    - Diving counts as 1 individual event
    - 400 Free Relay (Relay 3) counts as 1 individual event at VCAC
    - Back-to-back event restrictions
Upload a CSV psych sheet and parse it.

schema.title: Response Upload Psych Sheet Api V2 Championship Upload Psych Sheet Post

get.description: Returns available meet profiles and their rules.

schema.title: Response List Meet Profiles Api V2 Championship Meet Profiles Get

get.summary: Get scoring information for a meet profile

get.description:
Returns comprehensive information about available championship optimization strategies.
    
    Each strategy includes:
    - Detailed description
    - When to use it
    - Example scenarios
    - Pros and cons
    - Recommended use cases
    - Implementation status

schema.title: Response Get Strategies Api V2 Championship Strategies Get
